name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
85% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
46% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts a ring of Lightning around you, followed by a larger Lightning nova. Each effect hits enemies caught in their area with Lightning Damage.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: A wave of divine fire deals damage in a line, then creates Consecrated Ground and deals damage in an area around the targeted location. A larger shockwave then expands outwards, damaging enemies standing on Consecrated Ground that were not already hit.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
+1.1 metres to radius of Consecrated Ground
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Fire, Duration, Projectile, Orb

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a volcanic geyser at a location, which will repeatedly unleash projectiles sequentially over the surrounding area for a duration.
explicitMods: Maximum of 6 Geysers at a time
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will have a chance to be triggered when you are stunned. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods:
89% chance to Trigger Supported Spells when you are Stunned, or
Block a Stunning Hit
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Flaming bolts rain down over the targeted area. They explode when landing, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies. If normal or magic enemies are left below a percentage of maximum life after being hit by these skills, they will be killed.
explicitMods:
Kill Normal and Magic Rarity Enemies that have 36% Life or
lower when Hit by Supported Skills
Recover 2% of Life when Supported Skills Cull an Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "Beidat is the lesser of three evils. The other two desire only
to consume us, but under him, there is a chance to survive...
a chance to serve... if you can prove yourself useful."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.
explicitMods: Killing Blows with Supported Skills cause Enemies to have a 40% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Those citizens of Oriath touched by the
roving storms died most horrible deaths.

name: Nebulis
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
implicitMods: +5% to Quality of Socketed Chaos Gems
explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, causing them to be debilitated when they hit enemies and increasing damage they take while on low life.
explicitMods: Cursed Enemies take 58% increased Damage while on Low Life
Cursed Enemies are Debilitated for 2.00 Seconds when they Hit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

Ignite on Cursed enemies has 20% increased Duration

name: Dusk Mitts
implicitMods: Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit, applying -11% to Fire Resistance
Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.2 metres

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 76% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 203.3 Life per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Buff grants +26% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that adds fire damage to the attacks and spells of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies deal 109 to 155 additional Fire Damage with Attacks
You and nearby allies deal 109 to 155 additional Fire Damage with Spells
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Death Rush
explicitMods: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on Kill
flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

name: Azadi Crest
explicitMods:
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects use the best or
worst from three rolls instead of two
flavourText: "Keita expects an assassination attempt by stealth or subterfuge.
I say we attack head-on, like madmen. Let the fates decide."
- Azadi, first ancestor of the House Azadin

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.
